hub_subtitle: Business English para Missões Internacionais e Pequenos Negócios

lesson.menu_desc: Describe your region's products with there is / there are -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 3 -- Small Businesses & Local Products
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Flávia Florêncio Ferreira | Lesson 3 -- Small Businesses & Local Products
lesson.grammar_point: there is / there are (countable and uncountable nouns)

listenings.text: Hi Flavia, this is Antonio from the cooperative. Here is the news about our products for the fair. There are three hundred jars of honey ready this week, and there is a lot of fresh coffee in stock. The quality is very good this month. There are also two new customers from a shop in Europe. Please check the prices before Friday, and call me if you need more products. Thank you, and have a great fair.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to our local products fair. On the tables, there are many products from small businesses in our region. There is honey, there is coffee, and there are beautiful handmade jars. Please talk to our suppliers, ask about the quality, and try the free samples. Remember, there is a special price for every customer today. We are very happy to see you here. Enjoy the fair, and thank you for your visit.

extra_audio.text: Flavia arrives early and puts the products on the shelf. She checks the stock and the price of every jar. A customer comes to the stand and asks about the honey. Flavia explains the quality and shows the local coffee. The buyer likes the products and asks to talk after the fair.
